narrative: Reports of imminent strikes on Iran and missile launches in the UAE drive a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY holds 157.05 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; gold lower -2.41% near $4,532; equities -0.39%; DXY +0.25%; VIX 18.3. Fed's Williams trimming GDP forecasts adds to the dollar bid as Hormuz risks lift WTI toward $105. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC.
